summary: Full pipeline simulation using 48s Julius Caesar POV script sample. Traces every step from SRT parse through final prompt assembly, with concrete JSON at each stage. Identifies 3 real issues: (1) short staccato sentences (0.8s each) can't form valid 3-6s scenes individually, (2) subject shift rule is ambiguous when narrator POV bridges scenes, (3) time-skip sentences create awkward sequences. Proposes solutions for each.
